issuesFound.title: pricing period change not announced to screen readers
issuesFound.explanation: The pricing._updateSavingsMessage() function (called by setPeriod) updates the savings message text when the billing period toggles, but does not announce this change via a live region. Users are not informed of the new pricing context.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1665: _savingsMsg.textContent = ...; _savingsMsg.removeAttribute('hidden'); liveRegion.announce(_savingsMsg.textContent);

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion item state changes not announced to screen readers
issuesFound.explanation: The faqAccordion.open() and close() functions toggle the visibility of FAQ answers but do not announce the state change (e.g., "Answer expanded") to screen readers via a live region. Users may not realize the content has changed.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 2377: item.open = true; ... liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.faqOpened(item.question));
  Line 2406: item.open = false; ... liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.faqClosed(item.question));

issuesFound.title: siteSearch input missing initial aria-expanded attribute
issuesFound.explanation: The suggestionListRenderer.mount() function initialises the search input with aria-controls and role="combobox" but does not set the initial aria-expanded attribute (should be "false" when closed).
issuesFound.fix: Line 1538: setAttr(input, 'aria-expanded', 'false'); setAttr(input, 'aria-autocomplete', 'list');

issuesFound.title: inlineValidator missing aria-invalid updates
issuesFound.explanation: The inline validation function updates visual error states and aria-describedby associations, but it never sets the aria-invalid attribute on form fields when validation fails. Screen readers cannot programmatically identify which fields contain invalid data.
issuesFound.fix:
Line (in _renderResult, inside if (result.valid) block): Add `removeAttr(field, ARIA.INVALID);` before `srUtils.markValid(field, errorEl);`
  Line (in _renderResult, inside else block): Add `setAttr(field, ARIA.INVALID, 'true');` before `srUtils.markInvalid(field, errorEl);`

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu toggle missing aria-expanded updates
issuesFound.explanation: The dropdown menu instance functions manage panel visibility by adding and removing CSS classes and the hidden attribute, but they do not synchronise the aria-expanded state on the trigger button. Assistive technologies cannot announce the expanded or collapsed state of the dropdown to users.
issuesFound.fix:
Line (in _openInstance): Add `setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, true);` immediately after `inst.open = true;`
  Line (in _closeInstance): Add `setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, false);` immediately after `inst.open = false;`

issuesFound.title: productFilter missing live region announcement for results
issuesFound.explanation: When product filters are applied and cards are shown or hidden, the updated result count and filter state are not announced via a live region. Screen reader users are not informed that the content has changed or how many products are now visible.
issuesFound.fix: Line (in applyFilters, after _updateCountBadge(totalMatches)): Add `liveRegion.announce(\`Showing \${totalMatches} products\`);`

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu missing live region announcements
issuesFound.explanation: Opening or closing dropdown menus changes the visible content but does not announce the state change via the live region. Users may not be aware that a dropdown has opened or closed unless focus is immediately moved into the panel.
issuesFound.fix:
Line (in _openInstance, before emit): Add `liveRegion.announce('Dropdown opened');`
  Line (in _closeInstance, before emit): Add `liveRegion.announce('Dropdown closed');`

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion missing live region announcements
issuesFound.explanation: Expanding or collapsing FAQ items updates the visible content and aria-expanded attribute, but the content change is not announced via a live region. Screen reader users may not be notified that the answer text is now visible or hidden.
issuesFound.fix:
Line (in open()): Add `liveRegion.announce(\`Expanded: \${item.question}\`);` immediately after `emit(_containerEl, 'faq:open', { item });`
  Line (in close()): Add `liveRegion.announce(\`Collapsed: \${item.question}\`);` immediately after `emit(_containerEl, 'faq:close', { item });`

issuesFound.title: pricing billing period change not announced
issuesFound.explanation: When the user switches between monthly and annual billing periods, the price values update visually but the change is not announced via a live region. Screen reader users may not be aware that the prices have updated or which billing period is now active.
issuesFound.fix: Line (in setPeriod(), after _syncToggleState(period);): Add `liveRegion.announce(period === 'year' ? STRINGS.pricingAnnual : STRINGS.pricingMonthly);`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav trigger missing aria-controls attribute
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation trigger button does not have an aria-controls attribute linking it to the navigation drawer element, even though the drawer has an ID. This prevents assistive technologies from understanding the relationship between the trigger and the controlled content.
issuesFound.fix: Line (in init(), after _drawer is assigned): Add `if (_trigger && _drawer && _drawer.id) setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.CONTROLS, _drawer.id);`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav toggle functions do not update aria-expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: The mobileNav open() and close() functions toggle the visibility of the navigation drawer and body classes but do not update the aria-expanded attribute on the _trigger button. Screen reader users will not be informed whether the menu is open or closed when activating the toggle.

Line 1713: setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');
  Line 1735: setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');

issuesFound.title: mobileNav init does not initialise aria-expanded on trigger

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu toggle functions do not update aria-expanded on trigger

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion open function does not update aria-expanded on trigger

issuesFound.title: srUtils markInvalid function does not set aria-invalid

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion state changes not announced via live region

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markInvalid not setting aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: When marking a form field as invalid, the function adds the error message to aria-describedby but fails to set aria-invalid="true" on the field itself, which is required to communicate the invalid state to screen readers.
issuesFound.fix: Line markInvalid(): Add `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'true');` after `addDescribedBy(field, errorEl);`.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu toggle functions not updating aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The dropdown menu open and close functions manipulate the hidden attribute and CSS classes on the panel, but fail to update aria-expanded on the trigger button. This prevents assistive technologies from announcing the dropdown state.
issuesFound.fix: Line _openInstance(): Add `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` after `inst.open = true;`. Line _closeInstance(): Add `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` after `inst.open = false;`.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion open/close missing live region announcements
issuesFound.explanation: Although the functions accept an announceToSR parameter, they never actually call the live region announcer to inform screen readers when an accordion item expands or collapses.
issuesFound.fix: Line open(): Before the closing brace, add `if (announceToSR !== false) liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.faqOpened(item.question));`. Line close(): Add `if (announceToSR !== false) liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.faqClosed(item.question));`.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion open function not updating aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: While the close function sets aria-expanded to false, the open function sets the item.open state and removes the hidden attribute from the panel but never sets aria-expanded to true on the trigger button.
issuesFound.fix: Line open(): Add `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` after `item.open = true;`.

issuesFound.title: pricing toggle button not updating aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The billing period toggle buttons (monthly/annual) visually indicate the active state via CSS classes but do not update the aria-pressed attribute to communicate the pressed state to screen readers.
issuesFound.fix: Line _syncToggleState(): Inside the `_periodBtns.forEach` loop, add `setAttr(btn, 'aria-pressed', String(isActive));` after `toggleClass(btn, CSS.active, isActive);`.

issuesFound.title: productFilter tabs not updating aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The filter tab buttons use CSS classes to show the active filter, but they do not set aria-pressed to indicate which filter is currently active to assistive technology users.
issuesFound.fix: Line _syncTabAriaStates(): Inside the `forEach` loop, add `setAttr(btn, 'aria-pressed', String(isActive));` after `toggleClass(btn, CSS.active, isActive);`.

issuesFound.title: siteSearch open/close functions not updating aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The search combobox input has role="combobox" and aria-controls, but the open and close functions that show or hide the suggestion list never update aria-expanded to reflect the listbox visibility state.
issuesFound.fix: Line _open(): Add `setAttr(_inputEl, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` after `_searchState.open = true;`. Line _close(): Add `setAttr(_inputEl, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` after `_searchState.open = false;`.

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markValid not clearing aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: When clearing a field's invalid state, the function removes the error message from aria-describedby but does not remove the aria-invalid attribute or set it to false, leaving the field marked as invalid.
issuesFound.fix: Line markValid(): Add `removeAttr(field, 'aria-invalid');` or `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'false');` after clearing the describedBy references.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav trigger missing aria-controls initialization
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation trigger button is initialized without an aria-controls attribute pointing to the drawer element's ID, which is required to establish the programmatic relationship between the trigger and the controlled region.
issuesFound.fix: Line init(): After `_drawer` is assigned, add `if (_drawer && _trigger) setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-controls', srUtils.ensureId(_drawer, 'mobile-nav'));`.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav trigger missing initial aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The trigger button starts in a collapsed state (drawer hidden) but aria-expanded is never initialized to false on page load, leaving screen readers unaware that the drawer is collapsible.
issuesFound.fix: Line init(): After `_trigger` is assigned, add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu trigger missing initial aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: When registering a dropdown trigger, the code ensures aria-haspopup is set and the panel is hidden, but it does not initialize aria-expanded to false on the trigger button.
issuesFound.fix: Line register(): After `panel.setAttribute('hidden', '');`, add `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion triggers missing initial aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: FAQ item triggers are parsed and initialized, but aria-expanded is never set to reflect the initial open or closed state of each accordion item.
issuesFound.fix: Line faqRegistry.parse(): After determining `isInitiallyOpen`, add `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', String(isInitiallyOpen));`. Line faqAccordion.init(): Ensure all triggers have aria-expanded synchronized with their current state after initialization.

issuesFound.title: siteSearch combobox missing initial aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The search input acts as a combobox with a collapsible suggestion list, but aria-expanded is never initialized to false when the list is hidden on page load.
issuesFound.fix: Line suggestionListRenderer.mount(): After setting other ARIA attributes on the input, add `setAttr(input, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`.

issuesFound.title: productFilter applyFilters missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: When filters are applied and the product grid updates, the function emits a custom event but does not announce the filter results count or category change to screen readers via the live region.
issuesFound.fix: Line applyFilters(): Inside the filterAnimation.run callback, after `_updateCountBadge(totalMatches);`, add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.filterApplied(s.activeCategory));`.

issuesFound.title: pricing setPeriod missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: When the billing period is toggled between monthly and annual, the price updates visually but the change is not announced to screen readers, leaving users unaware that prices have switched.
issuesFound.fix: Line setPeriod(): After `emit(document, 'pricing:periodchange', ...);`, add `liveRegion.announce(period === 'year' ? STRINGS.announce.pricingAnnual : STRINGS.announce.pricingMonthly);`.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav open not moving focus to drawer
issuesFound.explanation: When the mobile navigation opens, focus remains on the trigger button instead of moving to the drawer content or the first focusable element inside it, forcing keyboard users to tab through the entire page to reach the navigation.
issuesFound.fix: Line open(): After `_lockScroll();`, add `const firstFocusable = getFocusableChildren(_drawer)[0] || _drawer; if (firstFocusable) firstFocusable.focus({ preventScroll: true });`.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav focus trap never created
issuesFound.explanation: The module declares a `_trap` variable but never initializes it with createFocusTrap(), meaning no focus trap is activated when the menu opens, allowing focus to escape to background elements.
issuesFound.fix: Line init(): After `_initialised = true;`, add `_trap = createFocusTrap(_drawer, { returnFocus: _trigger });`.

issuesFound.title: suggestionListRenderer setActiveIndex not updating aria-selected
issuesFound.explanation: When keyboard navigation highlights a suggestion, the function updates the visual styling and aria-activedescendant on the input, but fails to update aria-selected on the option elements themselves, which is required for listbox accessibility.
issuesFound.fix: Line setActiveIndex(): Inside the `items.forEach` loop, add `setAttr(item, 'aria-selected', String(isActive));` after `toggleClass(item, CSS.active, isActive);`.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav trigger aria-expanded not updated
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation toggle functions modify the visibility of the drawer and body classes but do not update the `aria-expanded` attribute on the trigger button (`_trigger`). Screen reader users will not be informed when the menu opens or closes.
issuesFound.fix: Line: mobileNav.open(): setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu trigger aria-expanded not updated
issuesFound.explanation: The dropdown menu instance functions toggle the panel visibility and classes but do not update the `aria-expanded` attribute on the trigger button (`inst.trigger`). This prevents assistive technologies from announcing the state change.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion open function missing aria-expanded update

issuesFound.fix: Line 1650: <button type="button" className={['filter-tab-btn', activeFilter === tab.value ? 'filter-tab-btn--active' : ''].filter(Boolean).join(' ')} tabIndex={activeFilter === tab.value ? 0 : -1} aria-pressed={activeFilter === tab.value} onClick={() => onChange(tab.value)}>

issuesFound.title: FilterTabs "Reporting" button missing aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The filter toggle button for "Reporting" tracks selection via activeFilter but lacks aria-pressed, so screen readers cannot announce the button's current state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1650: <button type="button" className={['filter-tab-btn', activeFilter === tab.value ? 'filter-tab-btn--active' : ''].filter(Boolean).join(' ')} tabIndex={activeFilter === tab.value ? 0 : -1} aria-pressed={activeFilter === tab.value} onClick={() => onChange(tab.value)}>

issuesFound.title: BillingToggle annual button missing aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The annual billing toggle button tracks the value state but lacks aria-pressed, preventing screen readers from announcing whether annual billing is currently selected.

issuesFound.title: HeroSection video toggle button missing aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The video play/pause toggle button manages the isPlaying state and updates its aria-label accordingly, but lacks aria-pressed. As a two-state toggle button, it should expose its pressed state explicitly to ensure consistent announcement across all screen readers.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1380: <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" aria-label={isPlaying ? 'Pause background video' : 'Play background video'} aria-pressed={isPlaying} onClick={handleTogglePlay} className="hero-section__video-toggle">

issuesFound.title: FaqItemComponent trigger button missing aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The FAQ accordion trigger button controls a panel (aria-controls) but lacks aria-expanded to reflect the isOpen state. Assistive technology users are not informed whether the answer is currently visible or hidden.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1676: <button type="button" id={btnId} aria-controls={panelId} aria-expanded={isOpen} className="faq-item__trigger" onClick={() => onToggle(item.id)}>

issuesFound.title: FilterTabs button missing aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The filter buttons function as a toggle group where only one is active at a time (tracked by activeFilter), but they lack aria-pressed. Screen reader users cannot identify which category filter is currently applied.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1335: <button type="button" className={['filter-tab-btn', activeFilter === tab.value ? 'filter-tab-btn--active' : ''].filter(Boolean).join(' ')} tabIndex={activeFilter === tab.value ? 0 : -1} onClick={() => onChange(tab.value)} aria-pressed={activeFilter === tab.value}>

issuesFound.title: TextInput component missing aria-invalid implementation
issuesFound.explanation: The TextInput component accepts an invalid prop but fails to pass aria-invalid to the underlying <input> element. Form fields in error state (e.g., in NewsletterForm and ContactForm) are not programmatically marked as invalid for assistive technology.
issuesFound.fix: Line 933: <input id={id} aria-invalid={invalid ? 'true' : undefined} className={['form-input', invalid ? 'form-input--error' : '', className].filter(Boolean).join(' ')} {...rest} />

issuesFound.title: TextInput component missing aria-invalid propagation
issuesFound.explanation: The TextInput component accepts an invalid prop to indicate error states but only applies a CSS class. It does not propagate this state to assistive technology via aria-invalid, so screen readers cannot announce the field's invalid state.

issuesFound.title: Textarea component missing aria-invalid propagation

issuesFound.title: Hero video toggle missing aria-pressed
